attributes.description: Alerts when TempDB free space drops below 100 MB. TempDB exhaustion affects sorts, hashes, snapshots, and version store.
attributes.name: [SQL Server OTel] TempDB space low

investigation_guide.blob:
## SQL Server TempDB space low

### What fired
TempDB free space dropped below 100 MB (102400 KB) during the window.

### Why it matters
TempDB is used by every connection for sorts, spills, and version store. Running out crashes many query patterns.

### Triage
1. Check version store size and long-running open transactions.
2. Inspect large sorts / hash joins.

### Remediation
- Kill the long-running transaction holding the version store.
- Grow TempDB files.

### Tuning
- 100 MB default; tune to TempDB total size.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-default
// TempDB space by state (free/used); filter for free space
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.database.tempdb.space IS NOT NULL
| WHERE COALESCE(attributes.tempdb.state, tempdb.state) == "free"
| STATS min_free_kb = MIN(metrics.sqlserver.database.tempdb.space),
       instance_id = MAX(resource.attributes.service.instance.id)
  BY COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, host.name, "unknown")
// Alert when free space below 100MB (102400 KB); adjust for your TempDB size
| WHERE min_free_kb < 102400
| KEEP instance_id, min_free_kb
